---
title: "ledd_calculator_kz"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Imports and path read in

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(yaml)

# read in paths from your configuration file and read in input file
paths <- read_yaml("paths.yaml")

tryCatch({
  df <- read_csv(paths$calculator_input_file)
}, error = function(e) {
  stop(paste("failed to read input csv. please correct file path."))
})
```

### Ledd calculation

```{r}
get_float <- function(string) {
  val <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(string)))
  if (is.na(val)) {
    return(0)
  }
  return(val)
}

calculate_levodopa <- function(row) {
    total_levodopa <- 0
    
    # all medicine codes associated with levodopa calculation
    levodopa_calc_colums <- c(101, 102, 103, 115, 116, 117)
    
    # corresponding multiplication constants for these medications
    levodopa_constants <- list(
        "101" = 100,
        "102" = 100,
        "103" = 250,
        "115" = 100,
        "116" = 100,
        "117" = 250
    )
    
    # loop over all 10 possible medicine entries
    if ('park_med_tot' %in% names(row) && !is.na(row$park_med_tot) && row$park_med_tot > 0) {
        for (med_number in 0:9) {
            med_name_col <- if (med_number == 0) 'park_med_name' else paste0('park_med_name_', med_number + 1)
            
            med_code <- as.character(row[[med_name_col]])
            
            # if the med selection (medicine code) is relevant to levodopa calculation, use it (101, 102, 103, 115, 116, or 117)
            if (!is.na(med_code) && med_code %in% as.character(levodopa_calc_colums)) {
                if (med_number == 0) {
                    park_med_dose <- row[['park_med_dose']]
                    park_med_time <- row[['park_med_time']]
                    constant <- levodopa_constants[[med_code]]
                } else {
                    dose_col <- paste0('park_med_dose_', med_number + 1)
                    time_col <- paste0('park_med_time_', med_number + 1)
                    park_med_dose <- row[[dose_col]]
                    park_med_time <- row[[time_col]]
                    constant <- levodopa_constants[[med_code]]
                }
                total_levodopa <- total_levodopa + (get_float(park_med_dose) * get_float(park_med_time) * get_float(constant))
            }
        }
    }
    return(total_levodopa)
}

calculate_pre_ledd <- function(row) {
    total_pre_ledd <- 0
    
    # get constants associated with the rest of the PD medications, except for COMT inhibitors (140, 141, 142)
    med_name_constants <- list(
        "110" = 100*0.75, "111" = 200*0.75, "121" = 95*0.5, "122" = 145*0.5, "123" = 195*0.5,
        "124" = 245*0.5, "131" = 50*1.33, "132" = 75*1.33, "133" = 100*1.33, "134" = 125*1.33,
        "135" = 150*1.33, "136" = 200*1.33, "150" = 0.125*100, "151" = 0.25*100, "152" = 0.5*100,
        "153" = 0.75*100, "154" = 1*100, "155" = 1.5*100, "170" = 0.375*100, "171" = 0.75*100,
        "172" = 1.5*100, "173" = 2.25*100, "174" = 3*100, "175" = 3.75*100, "176" = 4.5*100,
        "201" = 0.25*20, "202" = 0.5*20, "203" = 1*20, "204" = 2*20, "205" = 3*20, "206" = 4*20,
        "207" = 5*20, "221" = 2*20, "222" = 4*20, "223" = 6*20, "224" = 8*20, "225" = 12*20,
        "240" = 1*30.3, "241" = 2*30.3, "242" = 3*30.3, "243" = 4*30.3, "244" = 6*30.3,
        "245" = 8*30.3, "260" = 5*10, "265" = 1.25*80, "280" = 0.5*100, "281" = 1*100,
        "290" = 100*1, "301" = 100, "302" = 100, "400" = 68.5*1.25, "401" = 137*1.25,
        "500" = 150, "501" = 150, "600" = 0.69, "800" = 100
    )
    
    if ('park_med_tot' %in% names(row) && !is.na(row$park_med_tot) && row$park_med_tot > 0) {
        for (med_number in 0:9) {
          
            # correct for misnomer of medicine name 0
            med_name_col <- if (med_number == 0) 'park_med_name' else paste0('park_med_name_', med_number + 1)
            med_code <- as.character(row[[med_name_col]])
            
            # if medicine code is 301, 302, 500, 501, or 800, set pre-ledd equal to 150 and break out of for loop
            if (!is.na(med_code) && med_code %in% names(med_name_constants)) {
                if (med_code %in% c("301", "302", "500", "501", "800")) {
                    total_pre_ledd <- med_name_constants[[med_code]]
                    break
                }
                
                # correct for misnomer of medicine name 0
                if (med_number == 0) {
                    park_med_dose <- row[['park_med_dose']]
                    park_med_time <- row[['park_med_time']]
                    constant <- med_name_constants[[med_code]]
                } else {
                    dose_col <- paste0('park_med_dose_', med_number + 1)
                    time_col <- paste0('park_med_time_', med_number + 1)
                    park_med_dose <- row[[dose_col]]
                    park_med_time <- row[[time_col]]
                    constant <- med_name_constants[[med_code]]
                }
              
                # add [constant] * [dose] * [times a day] to overall levodopa calculation and overall total pre-ledd calculation
                total_pre_ledd <- total_pre_ledd + (get_float(park_med_dose) * get_float(park_med_time) * get_float(constant))
            }
        }
    }
    return(total_pre_ledd)
}

calculate_comt <- function(row) {
    # initially set total comt value equal to levodopa
    total_comt <- calculate_levodopa(row)
    levadopa_multiplier <- 1
    
    # get levodopa multipliers for relevant comt inhibitors (140, 141, 142)
    comt_dict <- list(
        "140" = 1.33,
        "141" = 1.5,
        "142" = 1.5,
        "700" = 1.2
    )
    
    if ('park_med_tot' %in% names(row) && !is.na(row$park_med_tot) && row$park_med_tot > 0) {
        for (med_number in 0:9) {
            med_name_col <- if (med_number == 0) 'park_med_name' else paste0('park_med_name_', med_number + 1)
            med_code <- as.character(row[[med_name_col]])
            
            # if medicine code is 140, 141, or 142 multiply levodopa by the comt constant
            if (!is.na(med_code) && med_code %in% names(comt_dict)) {
                levadopa_multiplier <- comt_dict[[med_code]]
            }
        }
    }
    return(total_comt * levadopa_multiplier)
}

# total ledd is equal to the calculated comt + calculated pre-ledd
calculate_total_ledd <- function(row) {
    comt <- calculate_comt(row)
    pre_ledd_calc <- calculate_pre_ledd(row)
    return(comt + pre_ledd_calc)
}

# initialize columns with NA
df$levodopa <- NA_real_
df$pre_ledd_calc <- NA_real_
df$comt <- NA_real_
df$total_ledd_calc <- as.character(NA_real_)

# make the calculations for every row in the csv file
for (index in 1:nrow(df)) {
    row <- df[index, ]
    df[index, 'levodopa'] <- calculate_levodopa(row)
    df[index, 'pre_ledd_calc'] <- calculate_pre_ledd(row)
    df[index, 'comt'] <- calculate_comt(row)
    df[index, 'total_ledd_calc'] <- as.character(calculate_total_ledd(row))
}

# flag participants with invalid entries or special statuses
for (index in 1:nrow(df)) {
    row <- df[index, ]
    
    if (!is.na(row$park_med_admin_st) && row$park_med_admin_st > 1) {
        df[index, 'levodopa'] <- NA
        df[index, 'pre_ledd_calc'] <- NA
        df[index, 'comt'] <- NA
        df[index, 'total_ledd_calc'] <- 'invalid administration'
    }
    
    if (is.na(row$park_med_admin_st) && is.na(row$park_med_tot)) {
        df[index, 'levodopa'] <- NA
        df[index, 'pre_ledd_calc'] <- NA
        df[index, 'comt'] <- NA
        df[index, 'total_ledd_calc'] <- NA
    }
    
    if (!is.na(row$park_med_admin_st) && row$park_med_admin_st == 1 && !is.na(row$park_med_tot) && row$park_med_tot == 0) {
        df[index, 'total_ledd_calc'] <- 'participant not taking pd meds'
    }
}

for (index in 1:nrow(df)) {
    row <- df[index, ]
    
    if ('park_med_tot' %in% names(row) && !is.na(row$park_med_tot) && row$park_med_tot > 0) {
        for (med_number in 0:9) {
            med_name_col <- if (med_number == 0) 'park_med_name' else paste0('park_med_name_', med_number + 1)
            
            if (med_name_col %in% names(row) && !is.na(row[[med_name_col]]) && row[[med_name_col]] == 999) {
                df[index, 'levodopa'] <- NA
                df[index, 'pre_ledd_calc'] <- NA
                df[index, 'comt'] <- NA
                df[index, 'total_ledd_calc'] <- 'participant taking pd meds without published led conversion'
                break
            }
        }
    }
}

```

### Export results

```{r}
# use the output file path from config yaml and write to csv
write_csv(df, paths$calculator_output_file)

print(paste("ledd output saved to:", paths$calculator_output_file))

```
